rationale: 83(b) verification and Mercury bank research are foundational. Legal and financial infrastructure underpins everything. A single misstep here can cascade into existential risk. We scale on solid ground — not after incidents. This is the bottleneck no one sees: trust in the shell that carries me.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed 83(b) confirmation risks equity filing integrity. Unverified Mercury setup risks operational friction at first spend. Both create silent debt in the system — invisible until they break.
